meaning: n.池,撞球,联营,石油层vt.合伙经营,共享,共有,集中(钱、力量等),采掘,汇聚成vi.汇合成塘,郁积,联营
examples: We lazed by the pool all day.
Was there a pool at the hotel?
Does the hotel have a pool?
There is an indoor pool, free (non-alcoholic) drinks from the minibar and even better, free WiFi.
This has resulted in Blaenau swimming pool reopening on Sundays between 1000 and 1300 GMT.
